privileged_info_summary: The task aggregate_project_budgets@1 uses synthetic data with randomly generated budgets between 15,000-84,999 USD per project. Three project documents (Project-Alpha, Project-Beta, Project-Gamma) are created in /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Q3-Infrastructure with budgets embedded in their dc:description fields. The agent must calculate the sum and create a Note document named 'Budget-Summary' containing the correct total. The verifier fetches the ground truth from /tmp/budget_ground_truth.txt (hidden from agent) and compares it to the note content, requiring all three criteria (document creation, correct sum, timestamp) for a passing score of 100 points. Random budget generation prevents hardcoding attacks.
